ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "opeid" INTEGER /* Operational identifier for the institution */,
  "opeid6" INTEGER /* An additional operational identifier */,
  "instnm" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "stabbr" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the institution */,
  "accredagency" TEXT /* Accrediting agency for the institution */,
  "insturl" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "npcurl" TEXT /* URL of the net price calculator */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (public, private, etc.) */,
  "control" TEXT /* Control of the institution (e.g., public, private, for-profit) */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Urban, suburban, or rural setting */,
  "instsize" INTEGER /* Total enrollment size */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., community college, university) */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the institution */,
  "campus_area" REAL /* Area of the campus in acres */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the institution's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the institution's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "ftftpctpell" REAL /* Percentage of full-time, first-time degree/certificate-seeking undergraduates receiving a federal Pell grant */,
  "ftftpctfloan" REAL /* Percentage of full-time, first-time degree/certificate-seeking undergraduates receiving a federal loan */,
  "ug12mn" INTEGER /* Number of undergraduate 12-month full-time equivalent students */,
  "g12mn" INTEGER /* Number of graduate 12-month full-time equivalent students */,
  "scugffn" INTEGER /* Number of students receiving federal grants */,
  "poolyrs_ftfaitdpct" INTEGER /* Number of years of pooled data for full-time, first-time students */,
  "ftftpctpell_pooled_supp" REAL /* Percentage of full-time, first-time degree/certificate-seeking undergraduates receiving a federal Pell grant (pooled) */,
  "ftftpctfloan_pooled_supp" REAL /* Percentage of full-time, first-time degree/certificate-seeking undergraduates receiving a federal loan (pooled) */,
  "scugffn_pooled" INTEGER /* Number of students receiving federal grants (pooled) */,
  "avg_aid_amount" REAL /* Average amount of financial aid per student */,
  "pell_grant_amount" REAL /* Average amount of Pell grants awarded */,
  "avg_loan_amount" REAL /* Average amount of federal loans per student */,
  "percent_students_aid" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving any financial aid */,
  "work_study_participation" REAL /* Percentage of students participating in work-study programs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "enrollment_total" INTEGER /* Total number of enrolled students */,
  "enrollment_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of undergraduate students */,
  "enrollment_graduate" INTEGER /* Number of graduate students */,
  "enrollment_trend" TEXT /* Trend in enrollment (increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "part_time_students" INTEGER /* Number of part-time students */,
  "full_time_students" INTEGER /* Number of full-time students */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "transfer_students" INTEGER /* Number of transfer students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditation" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the accrediting agency */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Status of the accreditation */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "accreditation_type" TEXT /* Type of accreditation (regional, national, specialized) */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next accreditation review */,
  "accreditation_scope" TEXT /* Scope of accreditation (institutional, program-specific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_outcomes" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the institution */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Retention rate of the institution */,
  "transfer_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who transfer to another institution */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of graduates employed within six months of graduation */,
  "graduate_school_rate" REAL /* Percentage of graduates who go on to further education */,
  "mean_earnings_10_years" REAL /* Mean earnings of graduates 10 years after graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "tuition_in_state" REAL /* Tuition for in-state students */,
  "tuition_out_state" REAL /* Tuition for out-of-state students */,
  "fees" REAL /* General fees */,
  "room_board" REAL /* Cost of room and board */,
  "books_supplies" REAL /* Cost of books and supplies */,
  "other_expenses" REAL /* Other expenses (e.g., transportation, personal expenses) */,
  "net_price" REAL /* Net price after financial aid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "gender_male" REAL /* Percentage of male students */,
  "gender_female" REAL /* Percentage of female students */,
  "ethnicity_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic students */,
  "ethnicity_black" REAL /* Percentage of Black students */,
  "ethnicity_white" REAL /* Percentage of White students */,
  "ethnicity_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian students */,
  "ethnicity_nativeamerican" REAL /* Percentage of Native American students */,
  "ethnicity_hawaiian_pacific_islander" REAL /* Percentage of Hawaiian/Pacific Islander students */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the student body */,
  "first_generation" REAL /* Percentage of first-generation college students */,
  "veteran_students" REAL /* Percentage of veteran students */,
  "international_students" REAL /* Percentage of international students */,
  "nontraditional_students" REAL /* Percentage of non-traditional students (e.g., part-time, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of the degree offered (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Date the program was first offered */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* Date the program was discontinued (if applicable) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of completing the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the faculty member (e.g., Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, Professor) */,
  "faculty_email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "faculty_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the faculty member's office */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  "publications" TEXT /* Notable publications of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for admissions */,
  "admission_rate" REAL /* Admission rate of the institution */,
  "sat_scores" TEXT /* Average SAT scores for admitted students */,
  "act_scores" TEXT /* Average ACT scores for admitted students */,
  "early_decision_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for early decision applications */,
  "early_action_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for early action applications */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Fee for submitting an application */,
  "yield_rate" REAL /* Percentage of admitted students who enroll */,
  "acceptance_requirements" TEXT /* Key requirements for acceptance (e.g., GPA, test scores) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_life" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "housing_options" TEXT /* Options available for on-campus housing */,
  "meal_plans" TEXT /* Available meal plans for students */,
  "student_organizations" TEXT /* List of student organizations on campus */,
  "athletic_teams" TEXT /* List of athletic teams at the institution */,
  "campus_housing_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of on-campus housing */,
  "campus_housing_cost" REAL /* Average cost of on-campus housing */,
  "campus_safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the campus (1-10) */,
  "student_satisfaction" REAL /* Average student satisfaction rating (1-5) */,
  "campus_activities" TEXT /* List of campus activities and events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "alumni" (
  "alumnus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alumnus */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the alumnus */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "current_occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the alumnus */,
  "alumni_email" TEXT /* Email address of the alumnus */,
  "alumni_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the alumnus */,
  "alumni_address" TEXT /* Address of the alumnus */,
  "alumni_employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (employed, unemployed, self-employed) */,
  "alumni_industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the alumnus is employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alumnus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alumni_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)
